lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.title: Anime Reversal Codes
lucidBlocksBeginnerGuide.intro: Codes are the fastest way to scale early summons, rerolls, and upgrades in Anime Reversal. This module keeps active rewards first and separates expired promos clearly.

steps.title: Redeem UPDATE3 for Anime Reversal resources
steps.description: Use UPDATE3 to claim 10,000 Gems and 300 Rerolls after you reach Level 2 and join the XTS Production group.

steps.title: Redeem TOKYO for Anime Reversal summons
steps.description: TOKYO gives 6,000 Gems and 100 Rerolls, making it a strong boost before your first serious banner cycle.

steps.title: Redeem 3POIT5MVISITS for Anime Reversal materials
steps.description: 3POIT5MVISITS grants 2,000 Gems, 150 Rerolls, and 2,000 Black Fire for early progression routes.

steps.title: Redeem SryForBug3 in Anime Reversal
steps.description: SryForBug3 gives 100 Rerolls and 700 Black Fire and is worth claiming before trait reroll sessions.

steps.title: Redeem ATOMIC and RAID for Anime Reversal value
steps.description: ATOMIC and RAID are still useful reward codes for extra Gems and Rerolls while building your first raid roster.

steps.title: Track active versus expired Anime Reversal codes
steps.description: Keep 30KLIKES, 2MVISITS, 20KMembers, and RAGNAROK in the expired list so players avoid wasted redemption attempts.

quickTips: Anime Reversal code redemption requires joining XTS Production and reaching Level 2.
Redeem active Anime Reversal codes before pulling on banners or rerolling traits.
Pin expired Anime Reversal codes in a separate block to keep the active list clean.
Check Anime Reversal updates first because new milestone codes often launch with patches.

lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.title: Anime Reversal Tier List
lucidBlocksApotheosisCrafting.intro: This Anime Reversal ranking focuses on progression value, not rarity alone. Ground DPS and control support remain the strongest core in the current patch.

cards.name: Anime Reversal S Tier Core Units
cards.description: RedHair (Awaken), Ruda (Fist), Kirita (Dual), IceQueen (Empress), Igres (Elite), Song Woo (Assassin), and Rio (Dancer) anchor the strongest lineups.

cards.name: Anime Reversal A Tier Flexible Picks
cards.description: Kirita (Order), FireFist (Captain), Bacchi (Rockstar), Enjo (Golden), and Ame (Curse) remain strong when your S tier slots are incomplete.

cards.name: Anime Reversal B Tier Early Fillers
cards.description: Cha-In (Sword Dancer) and Jang-In (Flame Master) can carry early progression but are best replaced in late content.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Farm Slot Priority
cards.description: SpeedCEO keeps your economy scaling and should hold the dedicated farm slot in most long runs.

milestones: Prioritize Anime Reversal ground DPS first
Add Anime Reversal freeze or stun support second
Keep one Anime Reversal economy unit active
Review Anime Reversal tiers after every major update

lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.title: Anime Reversal Beginner Guide
lucidBlocksToolsAndWeapons.intro: A focused opening route saves Gems, rerolls, and materials. This Anime Reversal checklist keeps your first sessions efficient and avoids weak early investments.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 1: Claim free resources
items.description: Join XTS Production, hit Level 2, and redeem active codes before spending on summons or rerolls.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 2: Build around ground DPS
items.description: Ground damage remains the safest opening investment because it fits the strongest current wave clear patterns.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 3: Keep strong early pulls
items.description: Prioritize Ruda (Fist), RedHair (Emperor), and Song Woo (Assassin) when they appear early.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 4: Add control support
items.description: After your first DPS core, add freeze or stun support to stabilize harder wave sets and bosses.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 5: Reserve one farm slot
items.description: SpeedCEO remains a long-term economy engine and helps your upgrades hit earlier breakpoints.

items.name: Anime Reversal Beginner Step 6: Plan first evolution
items.description: RedHair (Emperor) into RedHair (Awaken) is a high-value early project with strong stun control impact.

lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.title: Anime Reversal Units
lucidBlocksStorageAndInventory.intro: The Anime Reversal unit module should answer one question quickly: which unit deserves your next resources for story, raids, and long runs.

solutions.name: RedHair (Awaken)
solutions.description: Top-tier control plus AOE damage, ideal for raids and long-wave pressure in Anime Reversal.

solutions.name: Ruda (Fist)
solutions.description: Reliable full-AOE scaling DPS and one of the best early-to-late investments in Anime Reversal.

solutions.name: Kirita (Dual)
solutions.description: Strong sustained burst profile for bosses and dense waves in Anime Reversal.

solutions.name: IceQueen (Empress)
solutions.description: Wave control specialist that improves total team uptime against high-pressure rounds.

solutions.name: Song Woo (Assassin)
solutions.description: Excellent long-run scaling and strong synergy with Igres in Anime Reversal boss content.

solutions.name: Igres (Elite)
solutions.description: High burst damage profile for raid bosses and hard story checkpoints.

solutions.name: RedHair (Emperor)
solutions.description: Great interim AOE unit and the core base for the RedHair (Awaken) evolution route.

solutions.name: SpeedCEO
solutions.description: Dedicated farming slot that keeps Anime Reversal teams scaling through long stages.

managementTips: Build one Anime Reversal carry and one control unit before chasing niche picks.
Treat SpeedCEO as a permanent Anime Reversal economy slot in long runs.
Invest in evolvable Anime Reversal units to protect long-term resources.
Update Anime Reversal unit priorities after every patch and banner shift.

lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.title: Anime Reversal Traits Guide
lucidBlocksQualiaAndBaseBuilding.intro: In Anime Reversal, traits are changed through the Mandra (Traits) NPC in the Upgrades area, and Trait Rerolls are one of the highest-value code rewards. Current pairings should match each unit's scaling style instead of chasing random rerolls.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: Ruda (Fist)
cards.description: Ruda (Fist) is one of the strongest Ground carries with Full AOE scaling, so Elite is the cleanest high-impact trait target.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: RedHair (Emperor/Awaken)
cards.description: The RedHair line stays relevant from progression into late-game clears, and Awaken adds reliable stun, so damage-first rolling has top value.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: Kirita (Order)
cards.description: Kirita (Order) prefers a crit-and-sustain pairing, and Zodiac is the most practical route for keeping the Order branch competitive.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: IceQueen (Empress)
cards.description: IceQueen provides control uptime, so lower SPA creates more value than raw damage traits on support-focused runs.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: FireFist (Captain)
cards.description: FireFist scales best in packed wave pressure where Burn keeps ticking, and Doom is the trait that pushes that lane-clearing profile.

cards.name: Anime Reversal Trait Setup: Bacchi (Rockstar)
cards.description: Bacchi is guaranteed through the battle pass, and lower SPA helps passive cycling, making Luna or Silence better than random stat rolls.

highlights: Anime Reversal trait rerolls come from code rewards and should be saved for long-term carries.
Anime Reversal damage traits should be prioritized on Ground DPS anchors first.
Anime Reversal freeze and stun supports gain more from SPA-focused trait rolling.
Anime Reversal Mandra reroll sessions should use a fixed budget by unit priority.

lucidBlocksWorldRegions.title: Anime Reversal Evolutions
lucidBlocksWorldRegions.intro: Anime Reversal evolutions use a mix of materials, timed NPC windows, quest chains, and portal farming. The best routes are the ones that unlock real gameplay spikes such as stun control, boss pressure, or elite secret progression.

regions.name: Anime Reversal Evolution Route: RedHair to RedHair (Awaken)
regions.materials: Haki Hat EVO item, 10,000 Gems, 10 Rerolls, and 15,000 Gold
regions.trigger: The RedHair NPC appears in the lobby once every hour for 5 minutes, and Traveller NPC provides spawn hints.
steps: Check Traveller NPC for the active RedHair spawn hint.
Find the RedHair NPC during the hourly lobby window.
Buy the Haki Hat EVO item and complete the evolution.
regions.description: RedHair (Awaken) adds reliable stun on top of strong full-AOE damage, making it one of the highest-value upgrades.

regions.name: Anime Reversal Evolution Route: Hu Tao Secret Path
regions.targetForm: Hu Tao Funeral Parlor Elite into Doom Evolved Hu Tao
regions.trigger: Finish the full Hu Tao secret quest route before advancing to the evolved Doom branch.
steps: Start the Anime Reversal Hu Tao secret unlock route.
Complete the full quest chain tied to the secret line.
Claim Hu Tao Funeral Parlor Elite.
Advance the route into Doom Evolved Hu Tao for late-game scaling.
regions.description: This evolution line is a high-interest quest grind because it moves from secret unlock into a separate evolved showcase form.

regions.name: Anime Reversal Evolution Route: QinSha, Saka, and Hadas
regions.materials: Ragnarok portals, premium tickets, and Qin Sha NPC trade route
regions.trigger: Push higher Ragnarok portal tiers, then convert progression through the Qin Sha NPC trade path.
steps: Farm Ragnarok portals consistently in loops.
Push into higher-tier portal runs for premium ticket flow.
Locate the Qin Sha NPC trade route tied to portal progression.
Convert the farm route into elite secret evolution value.
regions.description: These units become significantly stronger endgame targets once their elite secret evolution routes are online.

lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.title: Anime Reversal Secret Units
lucidBlocksCreaturesAndEnemies.intro: Anime Reversal secret units combine RNG, quests, portals, and evolution routes. The highest-interest targets are the units that become core meta carries or unlock long quest-to-evolution chains.

creatures.name: RedHair (Awaken)
creatures.obtainMethod: Start from RedHair, evolve into Emperor, then use the Haki Hat route from the timed lobby NPC.
creatures.prerequisites: RedHair (Emperor), RedHair NPC spawn, and Haki Hat EVO item
creatures.description: RedHair (Awaken) is the most important Anime Reversal secret target because it combines full-AOE pressure with reliable stun.

creatures.name: Hu Tao Funeral Parlor Elite
creatures.obtainMethod: Complete the full Hu Tao quest path, then push toward the evolved Doom showcase branch.
creatures.description: Hu Tao is one of the most searched Anime Reversal secrets because the unlock is quest-based and extends into an evolved endgame route.

creatures.name: Yoji (Modula)
creatures.obtainMethod: Chase current JJK-era update routes and secret progression content.
creatures.description: Yoji (Modula) remains a headline Anime Reversal update target with strong showcase value for current-cycle players.

creatures.name: QinSha (Emperor)
creatures.obtainMethod: Farm Ragnarok portals, then use the Qin Sha NPC route linked to premium-ticket progression.
creatures.prerequisites: Portal farming plus secret NPC trade path
creatures.description: QinSha is a portal-linked Anime Reversal secret with a clear endgame farm target instead of a basic summon-only unlock.

lucidBlocksMobilityGear.title: Anime Reversal Raids
lucidBlocksMobilityGear.intro: Anime Reversal raid and portal content is a roster check centered on CID Raid, JJK Portal, and Ragnarok portal farming. The most consistent clears still use economy opening, Ground DPS pressure, and one stall-control slot.

items.name: Anime Reversal CID Raid Strategy
items.chaseTarget: CID raid progression and consistent clear route
items.minimumCore: 1 farm unit, 2 meta Ground DPS units, and 1 freeze or stun support
wavePriorities: Open with economy first so your damage curve is stable before heavy boss waves.
Get one full-AOE Ground carry online early.
Add stall support before the boss reaches the main lane.
items.description: RedHair stun plus IceQueen freeze is the easiest control loop for stable Anime Reversal CID clears.

items.name: Anime Reversal JJK Portal Strategy
items.chaseTarget: Update 3 JJK roster routes including Gaju, Sokuna, and Yoji (Modula)
items.minimumCore: Economy plus one wave-clear carry and one boss-delete pairing
wavePriorities: Stabilize lanes first, then pivot upgrades into boss damage.
Use Song Woo and Igres together for high boss pressure.
Keep one control slot active to prevent portal overruns.
items.description: JJK Portal is the clearest current Anime Reversal route for players chasing the newest update-cycle secrets.

items.name: Anime Reversal Ragnarok Tier 8 Strategy
items.chaseTarget: QinSha route, premium tickets, and secret NPC trade progression
items.minimumCore: High-end Ground DPS lineup with one support control slot
wavePriorities: Build stable wave clear before late-portal spikes begin.
Preserve boss damage for the harder end sections.
Farm this mode in loops when targeting QinSha and elite secret routes.
items.description: Ragnarok Tier 5+ routes are important because they feed the Anime Reversal secret NPC progression tied to QinSha.

unlockMilestones: Build an Anime Reversal raid core with economy, Ground DPS, and one control slot.
Clear Anime Reversal CID Raid with stable economy pacing.
Farm Anime Reversal JJK Portal for current update chase units.
Loop Anime Reversal Ragnarok portals for QinSha and elite secret progression.

lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.title: Anime Reversal Best Units
lucidBlocksFarmingAndGrowth.intro: This Anime Reversal shortlist is for players who want immediate unit decisions without reading the full tier matrix.

sections.name: Anime Reversal Best Carry Units
sections.description: RedHair (Awaken), Ruda (Fist), and Kirita (Dual) remain top carry candidates across modes.

sections.name: Anime Reversal Best Support Units
sections.description: IceQueen (Empress) and RedHair (Awaken) provide high control value for hard-content stability.

sections.name: Anime Reversal Best Economy Unit
sections.description: SpeedCEO remains the highest-value economy pick for long-wave and raid scaling.

sections.name: Anime Reversal Best Boss Units
sections.description: Igres (Elite) and Song Woo (Assassin) are standout boss pressure picks in current meta.

growthMilestones: Lock one Anime Reversal carry unit first
Add one Anime Reversal control support second
Reserve one Anime Reversal economy slot
Rotate Anime Reversal best-unit picks after each update

lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.title: Anime Reversal Trait Rerolls
lucidBlocksAchievementTracker.intro: Trait reroll guides should prioritize currency flow, target units, and stop-loss rules so Anime Reversal players avoid inefficient reroll spending.

achievements.title: Daily and event claim loops
achievements.description: Track daily tasks and event milestones first because they provide the most predictable reroll flow.

achievements.title: Code-based reroll boosts
achievements.description: Redeem active Anime Reversal codes before reroll sessions to improve pull efficiency.

achievements.title: Raid reward conversion
achievements.description: Prioritize raids that feed reroll resources without sacrificing core progression timing.

achievements.title: Patch-cycle stockpiling
achievements.description: Save reroll currency before major updates when trait value shifts are most likely.

achievements.title: Carry units first
achievements.description: Reroll top carries before supports because primary DPS gains scale across every mode.

achievements.title: Support units second
achievements.description: After carries are stable, optimize freeze or stun supports to smooth hard waves.

achievements.title: Economy unit last
achievements.description: Trait rerolls on economy slots should only happen after your combat core is stable.

achievements.title: Evolvable units prioritized
achievements.description: Focus rerolls on units with long-term evolution value to preserve resources.

achievements.title: Budget cap per session
achievements.description: Set a hard reroll cap before starting to prevent resource drain during bad streaks.

achievements.title: Accept strong interim traits
achievements.description: Do not chase perfect rolls immediately if current traits already clear your target content.

achievements.title: Re-evaluate after updates
achievements.description: Pause rerolls when a major patch is near and reassess trait priorities afterward.

achievements.title: Log reroll outcomes
achievements.description: Track outcomes by unit to refine future reroll strategy instead of repeating low-value loops.

achievements.title: Damage trait on core carry
achievements.description: Anchor your roster around one high-output carry with the best available damage trait.

achievements.title: Control trait on support
achievements.description: Pair control traits with freeze or stun supports for consistent wave management.

achievements.title: Boss specialist trait
achievements.description: Assign boss-focused traits to units dedicated to raid or elite pressure.

achievements.title: Meta alignment review
achievements.description: Check trait pairing against current Anime Reversal tier shifts each patch cycle.

lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.title: Anime Reversal Gems Guide
lucidBlocksSingleplayerAndPlatformFAQ.intro: This Anime Reversal gems guide focuses on practical income loops, spending order, and mistakes that slow account growth.

faqs.question: What is the fastest Anime Reversal gems route for new players?
faqs.answer: Start with active code redemption, then run high-value story clears and repeatable raid objectives for stable gem flow.

faqs.question: Should Anime Reversal gems go to summons or rerolls first?
faqs.answer: Use gems for core summon milestones first, then allocate rerolls once your main carry lineup is stable.

faqs.question: How many Anime Reversal gems should I keep in reserve?
faqs.answer: Keep a reserve for banner rotations and update drops so you can react when high-value units enter rotation.

faqs.question: Are Anime Reversal event gems worth prioritizing?
faqs.answer: Yes. Event milestones often provide concentrated gem rewards and should be part of your weekly planning.

faqs.question: What is the most common Anime Reversal gem mistake?
faqs.answer: Overspending on low-value pulls before securing one carry, one support, and one economy slot.

faqs.question: How often should Anime Reversal gem plans be updated?
faqs.answer: Review your gem plan after every major update or banner change because pull value can shift quickly.

lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.title: Anime Reversal Summon Banners
lucidBlocksSteamDeckAndController.intro: Banner guides should explain current value clearly: rate-up targets, pity planning, and who should skip or pull in Anime Reversal.

faqs.question: How should I evaluate an Anime Reversal banner?
faqs.answer: Compare rate-up units against your current roster gaps, then decide whether the banner solves carry, support, or raid needs.

faqs.question: When should I save in Anime Reversal instead of pulling?
faqs.answer: Save when the current banner does not improve your core progression lineup or when a major update banner is close.

faqs.question: How does Anime Reversal pity planning affect decisions?
faqs.answer: Track pity progress before spending so each pull contributes toward a guaranteed high-value outcome.

faqs.question: Which Anime Reversal players benefit most from selective pulls?
faqs.answer: New accounts and returning players gain the most by targeting banners that complete carry plus support synergy.

faqs.question: How should Anime Reversal banner guides connect to tier lists?
faqs.answer: Every banner recommendation should reference updated tier impact so pulls match the live meta.

lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.title: Anime Reversal Story Mode Guide
lucidBlocksSettingsAndAccessibility.intro: Story mode guides should break each chapter into lineup targets, placement flow, and reward outcomes for steady Anime Reversal progression.

settings.name: Anime Reversal Chapter Entry Check
settings.description: Confirm your carry, support, and economy slots before starting a new chapter push.

settings.name: Anime Reversal Opening Placements
settings.description: Open with efficient ground DPS placements and delay utility spending until economy stabilizes.

settings.name: Anime Reversal Mid-Wave Control
settings.description: Add freeze or stun supports during pressure spikes to protect core carry uptime.

settings.name: Anime Reversal Boss-Wave Setup
settings.description: Shift upgrades into boss-focused units before final waves and preserve cooldown timing.

settings.name: Anime Reversal Reward Routing
settings.description: Use chapter rewards to feed your next summon, trait reroll, or evolution milestone.

settings.name: Anime Reversal Story Re-clear Plan
settings.description: Re-clear chapters that deliver the best mix of gems, materials, and leveling speed.

lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.title: Anime Reversal Infinite Mode
lucidBlocksUpdatesAndPatchNotes.intro: Infinite mode planning is about scaling economy early, rotating cooldowns correctly, and keeping boss answers ready deep into wave progression.

entries.title: Anime Reversal Infinite Mode Opening
entries.description: Secure one carry plus one economy slot immediately so your upgrade curve stays ahead of wave scaling.

entries.title: Anime Reversal Infinite Mode Mid-Game
entries.description: Layer freeze or stun support once wave density increases to preserve damage uptime.

entries.title: Anime Reversal Infinite Mode Late Waves
entries.description: Shift gold into boss counters and full-AOE upgrades to avoid collapse in late-wave spikes.

entries.title: Anime Reversal Infinite Mode Reward Planning
entries.description: Track wave breakpoints and stop when reward-per-minute drops below your raid or story alternatives.

faq.title: Anime Reversal FAQ
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Anime Reversal

questions.question: What is Anime Reversal and why is it popular?
questions.answer: Anime Reversal is a Roblox anime tower defense game focused on unit progression, trait optimization, evolutions, and raid clears.

questions.question: Where can I get active Anime Reversal codes?
questions.answer: Use the Anime Reversal codes module for active and expired code tracking, then redeem codes after meeting level and group requirements.

questions.question: Which Anime Reversal units should I build first?
questions.answer: Start with one carry DPS, then add one control support and one economy unit for consistent progression.

questions.question: How should I spend Anime Reversal rerolls and gems?
questions.answer: Prioritize stable summon milestones first, then reroll high-value traits on your long-term core units.

questions.question: What does the Anime Reversal tier list prioritize?
questions.answer: The tier list prioritizes practical performance in story, raids, and long-wave modes instead of rarity alone.

questions.question: Where are official Anime Reversal community links?
questions.answer: Use the Anime Reversal Community Links module for Discord, Roblox group, YouTube channel, and trailer access.
